items.text: Hi Maya, Just a reminder that Photography Club dues of $15 are due by Friday, October 10. Please drop your payment at the Student Activities Office in Building C, Room 120, before 4:00 PM. Members who pay on time will receive a free darkroom pass. Thanks, Leo

questions.stem: According to the email, what will members who pay on time receive?
questions.explanation: The email states that members who pay on time will receive a free darkroom pass.

questions.stem: Where should Maya deliver her payment?

options.A: To the darkroom in Building A
options.C: To Leo at the club meeting

questions.explanation: The email asks Maya to drop her payment at the Student Activities Office in Building C, Room 120.

items.text: Dear Aiden, Your study room reservation for Group 4 is confirmed for Tuesday, March 5, from 2:00 to 4:00 PM in Room 208. Please arrive on time, since unused rooms are released to other students after fifteen minutes. A $5 fee applies to any late cancellation. Best, Library Services

questions.stem: According to the email, what happens if Aiden arrives more than fifteen minutes late?

options.A: The room is given to other students
options.B: The room stays reserved until closing
options.C: The room is moved to another floor
options.D: The room booking is extended an hour

questions.explanation: The email says unused rooms are released to other students after fifteen minutes.

questions.stem: How much is charged for a late cancellation?
questions.explanation: The email states that a $5 fee applies to any late cancellation.
